description: CompositionGrey V-neck sweater made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed neckline with white stripes, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, embroidered brand logo on the upper right chest and a ribbed hemlineFitRegularWash careHand wash cold inside out with like coloursLay flat to dryReshape and warm ironDry cleanThis white sweater from nike is inspired by classic sport clothing. The knit fabric and long sleeves add comfortable warmth to the sweater, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with shirts and jeans or chinos.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
